issue.message: This LinearLayout should use `android:layout_height="wrap_content"`
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
issue.errorLine1: val timeString = String.format("%02d:%02d:%02d", hours, minutes, seconds)

issue.message: Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
Attribute `targetCellWidth` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 26)
Attribute `targetCellHeight` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 26)
Attribute `previewLayout` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 26)
Attribute `widgetFeatures` is only used in API level 28 and higher (current min is 26)
Attribute `targetCellWidth` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 26)
Attribute `targetCellHeight` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 26)
Attribute `previewLayout` is only used in API level 31 and higher (current min is 26)
Attribute `widgetFeatures` is only used in API level 28 and higher (current min is 26)
Permission is only granted to system apps

issue.message: "turn_on_anti_uninstall" is not translated in "de" (German) or "hi" (Hindi)
"minutes" is not translated in "de" (German), "hi" (Hindi), "pt" (Portuguese)
"app_icon" is not translated in "de" (German) or "hi" (Hindi)
"accessibility_permission_app_blocker" is not translated in "de" (German) or "hi" (Hindi)
"accessibility_permission_view_blocker" is not translated in "de" (German) or "hi" (Hindi)

"accessibility_permission_keyword_blocker" is not translated in "de" (German) or "hi" (Hindi)
issue.errorLine1: <string name="accessibility_permission_keyword_blocker">" Enabling this would unlock the following in DeenShield: 1. Block custom keywords 2. Block content like adult material DeenShield needs access to accessibility data to know when you open a specific feature within an app, like a social media feed or a game. This lets DeenShield block those features for you based on your preferences, helping you stay focused and reduce screen distractions. Rest assured, all accessibility data stays securely on your device—we never share or transmit your data, ensuring your privacy is always protected. "</string>

issue.message: "accessibility_permission_general_features" is not translated in "de" (German) or "hi" (Hindi)
issue.errorLine1: <string name="accessibility_permission_general_features">" Enabling this would unlock the following in DeenShield: 1. Anti-Uninstall (Setup required to run) DeenShield needs access to accessibility data to know when you open a specific feature within an app, like a social media feed or a game. This lets DeenShield block those features for you based on your preferences, helendping you stay focused and reduce screen distractions. Rest assured, all accessibility data stays securely on your device—we never share or transmit your data, ensuring your privacy is always protected. "</string>

"accessibility_perm_desc" is not translated in "de" (German) or "hi" (Hindi)
issue.errorLine1: <string name="accessibility_perm_desc">DeenShield uses the Accessibility permission to provide features like app monitoring and usage tracking to enhance your experience. This permission allows DeenShield to detect app activities and help manage device usage effectively. Rest assured, all data is processed locally on your device and is never sent to any server or third party. Your privacy and data security are our top priorities. By pressing Accept, you acknowledge and agree to the above .</string>

issue.errorLine1: <string name="device_admin_perm">DeenShield uses Device Admin permission to enhance security and block uninstalling deenshield until a specific period. All data remains securely stored on your device and is never shared externally.</string>

issue.message: "device_perm_draw_over_other_apps" is not translated in "de" (German) or "hi" (Hindi)
issue.errorLine1: <string name="device_perm_draw_over_other_apps">DeenShield uses the "Display over other apps" permission to show a small floating overlay on the screen. This overlay tracks the number of reels watched and the time spent, helping users be more aware of their usage in real time.</string>

String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.
issue.errorLine1: "DeenShield requires device usage access to monitor apps, helping you manage screen time effectively and stay focused on your goals. Rest assured, all data stays securely on your device and is never shared with anyone, ensuring your privacy is fully protected."

issue.message: String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.
Number formatting does not take into account locale settings. Consider using `String.format` instead.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
Number formatting does not take into account locale settings. Consider using `String.format` instead.

Number formatting does not take into account locale settings. Consider using `String.format` instead.

issue.message: Hardcoded string "Redirection works only on Chrome, Brave, Firefox, and Opera. If you check the box above, the keyword blocker will function across all apps, but redirection will be disabled in unsupported apps, and DeenShield will press the home button when a blocked keyword is detected.", should use `@string` resource
issue.errorLine1: android:text="Redirection works only on Chrome, Brave, Firefox, and Opera. If you check the box above, the keyword blocker will function across all apps, but redirection will be disabled in unsupported apps, and DeenShield will press the home button when a blocked keyword is detected." />

issue.message: Hardcoded string "Ignored Apps ", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "How long to unlock for after proceeding?", should use `@string` resource
issue.errorLine1: android:text="How long to unlock for after proceeding?" />

issue.message: Hardcoded string "Press back directly without showing a warning screen", should use `@string` resource
issue.errorLine1: android:text="Press back directly without showing a warning screen" />

issue.message: Hardcoded string "How long to wait before being able to press the proceed button. Prevents from instantly pressing the button without reading the message.", should use `@string` resource
issue.errorLine1: android:text="How long to wait before being able to press the proceed button. Prevents from instantly pressing the button without reading the message." />

issue.message: Hardcoded string "3 sec", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "9 sec", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "15 sec", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "30 sec", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Quick Setup Guide", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "DeenShield needs Accessibility permissions to help you track your screen time. The setup process varies based on how you installed the app.", should use `@string` resource
issue.errorLine1: android:text="DeenShield needs Accessibility permissions to help you track your screen time. The setup process varies based on how you installed the app."

issue.message: Hardcoded string "F-Droid Installation", should use `@string` resource

Hardcoded string "✅ Installed via F-Droid app?
You're all set! Just follow the accessibility setup in the next step.

⚠️ Downloaded from F-Droid website?
Please install through the F-Droid app instead to avoid permission issues.", should use `@string` resource
issue.errorLine1:
android:text="✅ Installed via F-Droid app?
You're all set! Just follow the accessibility setup in the next step.

⚠️ Downloaded from F-Droid website?
Please install through the F-Droid app instead to avoid permission issues."

issue.message: Hardcoded string "APK Installation", should use `@string` resource

Hardcoded string "If you installed from an APK, follow these steps:

1️⃣ Open Settings → Apps → DeenShield

2️⃣ Tap Permissions → Special App Access → Accessibility → Enable DeenShield

3️⃣ Return to DeenShield App Info → Scroll down → Tap Restricted Settings → Allow

💡 Pro tip: Install via F-Droid app for a smoother setup! 🚀", should use `@string` resource
issue.errorLine1:
android:text="If you installed from an APK, follow these steps:

1️⃣ Open Settings → Apps → DeenShield

2️⃣ Tap Permissions → Special App Access → Accessibility → Enable DeenShield

3️⃣ Return to DeenShield App Info → Scroll down → Tap Restricted Settings → Allow

💡 Pro tip: Install via F-Droid app for a smoother setup! 🚀"

Hardcoded string "1. Loading...", should use `@string` resource

Hardcoded string "3. Loading...", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "Welcome to DeenShield", should use `@string` resource

Hardcoded string "You're among the first to try DeenShield, an app designed to help you take control of your screen time in a fun and engaging way. 🚀

Since we're still in beta, you might encounter a few rough edges—we'd love your feedback to make DeenShield even better!

Let's start your journey to a healthier digital balance. 🎯", should use `@string` resource
issue.errorLine1:
android:text="You're among the first to try DeenShield, an app designed to help you take control of your screen time in a fun and engaging way. 🚀

Since we're still in beta, you might encounter a few rough edges—we'd love your feedback to make DeenShield even better!

Let's start your journey to a healthier digital balance. 🎯"
